positive: Minimalist stylized illustration of a majestic mountain peak at sunrise. The mountain silhouette should be crisp and geometric, rising above a calm, stylized river. A few stylized, abstract stars are visible in the pale gradient sky. Use a limited color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, slate gray, and creamy yellow. Clean vector art aesthetic, highly contrasted, bold shapes, centered composition, suitable for screen printing on a dark fabric, isolated on a white background for layering.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low quality, text, logo, watermark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, noise, complex details, messy, realistic photography, gradient skin
